title: サクラチヨノオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for Sakura Chiyono O
to take on the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As such, we're attending an information session
for Umamusume making their debuts soon, but a
certain someone seems a bit flustered...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-o-oh my gosh. I-it's finally here... U-uh...
choice_data_list: Want to take some deep breaths?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: S-sure! Let's do it together!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Inhale... Inhale...
choice_data_list: Don't just inhale! You have to exhale too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Exhale! Exhale! Exhaaale!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine! Probably. For sure! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is stiff with nerves as we walk
into the room where the information session will
be held.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-the pressure in here... is overwhelming!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello, Chiyono O. Come take a seat. This
chair's available.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan! I'm looking forward to racing with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan of the Mejiro family... She's a school
year above Sakura Chiyono O, but it seems they'll
be debuting at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what school year they're in, all the
Umamusume here today will be running peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are quite a number of Umamusume in here,
and I heard there will be some students
transferring in at a later date too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as Sakura Chiyono O's nerves are getting
the better of her, I do my best to observe her
potential rivals. But then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O suddenly pokes me in the side
and hands me something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A notebook I prepared in advance. I, um, thought
it would be of some help to you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the notebook she handed me and am
immediately struck by the walls of handwritten
text in it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You can keep that if you'd like. I've already
memorized everything written in it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: For example, look at page one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo is the hot-blooded head of the
disciplinary committee. True to her temperament,
she excels at sprints and mile races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
However, due to the fragility of her toenails, she
has already decided to run on dirt instead of turf
to start with.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Creek is a stayer who prefers
long distances. It's also worth noting that she is
very good at caring for others.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
From that, we can discern that she is incredibly
perceptive, able to spot people's strengths and
weaknesses with ease.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's what I've been able to dig up! If
you flip through to the second half, I've listed up
some information on Ardan and Yaeno too!
choice_data_list: You've certainly put a lot of work into this!
You've certainly put a lot of work into this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Preparation and review are the
foundation for readiness, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'll need to put a lot of work in if I want
to win the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no race more important to Sakura
Chiyono O than the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's because of Maruzensky, an
Umamusume Sakura Chiyono O greatly admires.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Known as the Beast thanks to her overwhelming
strength, she's the one who gave Sakura Chiyono
O this dream.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Good luck in the real Japanese Derby. Do what I
could only dream of doing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You would entrust your dreams... to me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And I... I swear, I will win the Japanese Derby! I will become the number one runner!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So when... when that happens, when I'm
stronger... Will you run with me again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...You can only compete in the Japanese Derby
once in your life, and only one Umamusume can
come out of it the victor.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to do it, Trainer. For her sake...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Without question!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the information session, we decide to do
some quick training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Trainer... Can I please... take a water break?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Sakura Chiyono O is taking a break, I look
over the notebook she gave me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few potential rivals she'll have to
contend with if she's aiming for the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First of all, there's Yaeno Muteki. I hear that like
Sakura Chiyono O, she's skilled at
medium-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to these notes, her grandfather is the
master of the Kongo Yaegaki style of martial arts.
Having trained diligently, she can pull off
terrifying bursts of speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan, whom Sakura Chiyono O was
speaking to earlier, may run in the Derby as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ardan is the younger sister of Mejiro Ramonu, the
first Umamusume to ever win the Triple Tiara. She
is also very talented, and expectations for her are
high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she decides against running the Tiara tour,
there's no doubt she'll be a powerful rival for
Sakura Chiyono O in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm fully charged! I'm ready to run
another—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O suddenly freezes, her eyes
locked on something in the distance. I turn to see
what she's staring at, and when I do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see none other than Maruzensky, along with the
Triple Crown champion, Mr. C.B.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unusual to see Maruzensky near the track. I
was sure she said she was going to forgo running
in the Twinkle Series for a while...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyooo! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-oh, uh! I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... hehe... Oh my gosh... Maruzen just
cheered me on...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-well, she's the dream I'm chasing, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's the devastatingly powerful Hot Rod who
breaks boundaries wherever she goes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The first time I saw her run, I knew I wanted to be
like her—to someday stand as her equal.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of how mediocre an Umamusume I am,
this is the one dream I never want to give up on...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Although considering how lofty a dream it is, I
may not be able to actually reach it.
choice_data_list: Then I'll be your stepping stool.
Then I'll be your stepping stool.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
If you use me to take a step up, you might be
able to reach your dream.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hahaha! I couldn't possibly use you as a
stepping stool. That would be rude!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But that did help me come up with a new proverb!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
From now on, we'll be working closely together,
so...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: "I'm the pot, and you're the ladle"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A pot and a ladle have different jobs, but you
need both to make a delicious chanko hot pot!
choice_data_list: You're the pot, and I'm the ladle...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's it! Now let's get cooking, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my days of training with Sakura Chiyono
O begin.
